title: VolumeAttachment
description: A base object for all types of volume attachments. Represents the attachment between a compute instance and a block volume.

id.description: The OCID of the volume attachment

instanceId.description: The OCID of the instance the volume is attached to

availabilityDomain.description: The availability domain of an instance

displayName.description: A user-friendly name for the attachment

lifecycleState.description: The lifecycle state of the volume attachment

timeCreated.description: The date and time the volume was attached

isReadOnly.description: Whether the attachment was created in read-only mode

isShareable.description: Whether the attachment should be created in shareable mode

isPvEncryptionInTransitEnabled.description: Whether in-transit encryption is enabled for the attachment

iscsiLoginState.description: The iSCSI login state of the volume attachment
